questions.statement:
<p>Choose the most appropriate synonym of the <u><strong>underlined word</strong></u> given in the sentence below:</p>

<p>We could hear the <u><strong>groans</strong></u> of the wounded soldiers.</p>

<p>Directions: In the following items, a sentence is given with a blank space that is required to be filled with a phrasal verb. Select the most appropriate response from the options provided and mark your response accordingly.&nbsp;</p>

<p>She ___ the old documents in the attic.&nbsp;</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate option for the given blank.</p>

<p>They ___&nbsp;a strike when the party members refused their plea.&nbsp;</p>

<p dir="ltr"><strong>Direction: Choose the right idiom to complete the sentence.</strong></p>

<p dir="ltr">In the midst of chaos, he was the only one who could _________.</p>
options: <span id="docs-internal-guid-81087b72-7fff-872f-f07e-a1919edf9941"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">bite the dust</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-87784567-7fff-9228-3877-878d3c1e6821"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">jump on the bandwagon</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-baf246e5-7fff-9a87-f771-90732ef93037"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">miss the mark</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-3f3cde0c-7fff-a368-7ec3-8d4cecadff0d"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">keep his head</span></span> /

questions.statement:

questions.statement:

<p>A formal resignation and renunciation of powers.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word.</strong></p>

<p>The huts they lived in were <u><strong>sordid</strong></u> and filthy beyond belief.</p>

<p>Perilous&nbsp;</p>
